entities.name: Assign Fiscal Position
entities.mention: assign fiscal positions to your contractors

relations.evidence: Access the TPAR in Odoo by going to Accounting --> Reporting
Taxable Payments Annual Reports (TPAR)
Odoo allows businesses to report payments made to contractors
This is done by generating a TPAR
The TPAR can be exported to multiple formats
This is done by generating a TPAR
To do so, go to Accounting --> Vendors --> Vendors
assign fiscal positions to your contractors
The TPAR includes the following information from contractors: - ABN
Total GST (the total tax paid)
Gross Paid (the amounts are displayed after a vendor bill has been marked as paid)
Tax Withheld (displayed if the contractor is registered with a fiscal position set to TPAR without ABN)
If you are unsure your business needs this report, refer to the ATO's TPAR web page
